title: Sample Dilution with CSV Input
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol dilutes sample with water at 4C, mixing with the transfer volume for 3 repetitions upon dispensing. The multi-channel pipette will be used as a single for this protocol. * `CSV Sample Format`: Below, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Destination Well, Transfer Volume A1, 5 B1, 2 etc. ```
steps_raw: This protocol dilutes sample with water at 4C, mixing with the transfer volume for 3 repetitions upon dispensing. The multi-channel pipette will be used as a single for this protocol. * `CSV Sample Format`: Below, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Destination Well, Transfer Volume A1, 5 B1, 2 etc. ```
Add water to sample according to csv
materials_raw: Armadillo 96 Well Plate 200 µL PCR Full Skirt #AB2396
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
